models.service_notes: Use full sticker code, production index, and PCB revision before ordering spare boards.

faults.title: Water inlet timeout
faults.description: Check tap, inlet valve, filter mesh, and supply pressure.

faults.title: Drain timeout
faults.description: Inspect drain pump, hose blockage, standpipe, and filter.

faults.title: Door lock fault
faults.description: Check door lock, latch, harness, and lock command from main board.

faults.title: Heating / thermistor family fault
faults.description: Inspect heater, NTC, wiring, and control relay.

faults.title: Motor inverter PCB error
faults.description: Check communication between main PCB and inverter PCB on BLDC models.

faults.title: Overflow / level abnormal
faults.description: Inspect pressure system, valve leak-by, and foam/water level sensing.

boards.name: Main PCB
boards.notes: Confirm exact board by full model code and version sticker before ordering.

boards.name: Display / UI PCB
boards.notes: Front panel board; compare connector count and fascia version.

parts.notes: Variant differs by chassis and region.
Heating models require correct sensor curve.
